title: EXCLUSIVE: Cuba pitches US economic roadmap despite Trump threats
shortDescription: Cuba’s top diplomat says the island is open to economic cooperation, outlining a roadmap for closer ties even as Trump pushes regime change.

title: Trump signs executive order on mail-in ballots
shortDescription: President Donald Trump moved to assert federal control over mail-in ballots with an executive order.

title: Trump says he will 'continue building' ballroom
shortDescription: After a judge issued an order to halt President Donald Trump's plan to build a ballroom, Trump told reporters he will 'continue building' it anyway.

title: Trump signs order exerting federal control on mail-in ballots
shortDescription: Trump has suggested for months that the federal government could nationalize the voting process, generating bipartisan pushback.

title: Judge says Trump funding cuts on NPR and PBS unconstitutional
shortDescription: A federal judge blocked an executive order by President Donald Trump that cut funding for National Public Radio and the Public Broadcasting Service.

title: Trump must halt $400M White House ballroom, judge rules
shortDescription: A federal judge issued an order to halt President Donald Trump's plan to build a $400 million White House ballroom.

title: Robert De Niro and Bruce Springsteen protest against Trump
shortDescription: Across the country, more than 3,200 events took place on the third "No Kings" protest day, with stars such as Robert De Niro and Bruce Springsteen participating.

title: Canada sharply reduced US liquor imports under Trump tariffs: industry
shortDescription: US liquor exports dropped last year as Canada and Europe retaliated against Trump's emergency tariffs, which have since been overturned.

title: Trump threatens Iran civilian structures
shortDescription: Iran attacked a fully loaded Kuwaiti crude oil tanker off the coast of Dubai, despite the president’s threats.

title: Eric Trump unveils presidential library renderings
shortDescription: Eric Trump shares first renderings of his father's presidential library and museum planned for downtown Miami along Biscayne Boulevard.

title: Trump to address the nation, give 'important update' on Iran war
shortDescription: The president will deliver an address on Wednesday evening for an "important update on Iran," White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt announced.

title: How Trump's attempt to limit birthright citizenship could affect millions
shortDescription: Here's how President Trump's attempt to sharply limit birthright citizenship could affect millions of Americans.

title: Trump reveals renderings of towering presidential library in Miami
shortDescription: Eric Trump posted a video showing the renderings of his father's presidential library and museum, calling it a "lasting testament to an amazing man."

title: Gov. DeSantis signs bill to rename Florida airport after Trump
shortDescription: The decision to rename the airport follows Florida's approval of a plan to donate a Miami property for the site of Trump's presidential library.
